languages.text: "Отставить поножовщину! Возьмите себя в руки, вы же гвардейцы!"
"Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"
languages.original_text: "Отставить поножовщину! Возьмите себя в руки, вы же гвардейцы!"

traits.locale_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"
"Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"
"Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"
"Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

languages.text: “你们俩都给我住手！冷静点。黄金王座在上，你们可是卫兵！”
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: “你们俩都给我住手！冷静点。黄金王座在上，你们可是卫兵！”

languages.text: "Geri çekilin, ikiniz de! Kendinize gelin. Taht aşkına... Muhafızsınız siz!"
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: "Geri çekilin, ikiniz de! Kendinize gelin. Taht aşkına... Muhafızsınız siz!"

languages.text: « Arrêtez, tous les deux ! Vous devez vous ressaisir. Vous êtes des gardes impériaux, par le Trône ! »
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: « Arrêtez, tous les deux ! Vous devez vous ressaisir. Vous êtes des gardes impériaux, par le Trône ! »

languages.text: «¡Alto a los dos! Contrólense. ¡Son Guardias Imperiales, por el Trono!».
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Alto a los dos! Contrólense. ¡Son Guardias Imperiales, por el Trono!».

languages.text: "Zurück. Alle beide! Reißt Euch zusammen. Ihr seid Gardisten, beim Thron!"
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: "Zurück. Alle beide! Reißt Euch zusammen. Ihr seid Gardisten, beim Thron!"

languages.text: 「やめろ、お前たち二人共！落ち着け。お前たちは衛兵だ、神聖なる王座のために！」
languages.original_text: "Stand down, both of you! Get a hold of yourselves. You are Guardsmen, for Throne's sake!"

traits.locale_text: 「やめろ、お前たち二人共！落ち着け。お前たちは衛兵だ、神聖なる王座のために！」
